questions.question: Briefly explain how decentralization in a blockchain network enhances security.
expectedPoints: Data is replicated across many nodes
An attacker would need to compromise a majority of the network to alter data

questions.question: Discuss the major applications of blockchain technology beyond cryptocurrencies. Provide examples for at least three different industries.
expectedPoints: Supply Chain Management: e.g., tracking provenance of goods from origin to sale.
Healthcare: e.g., secure and portable patient medical records.
Digital Identity: e.g., self-sovereign identity control and verification.
Voting Systems: e.g., tamper-proof digital voting platforms.
Smart Contracts: e.g., automated execution of insurance policies or financial agreements.
